quotable_excerpt: The most satisfying use I've found for AI in writing (besides basic copy-editing), is having AI systems write the words used by AI systems in my fiction. This feels important to me - I let the synthetic intelligence animate itself within a
source_title: The most satisfying use I've found for AI in writing (besides basic copy-editing), is having AI systems write the words
summary_for_indexing: The most satisfying use I've found for AI in writing (besides basic copy-editing), is having AI systems write the words used by AI systems in my fiction. This feels important to me - I let the synthetic intelligence animate itself within a narrative construct I have built.
